commands.cmd:
raw=$(journalctl -u cron --since "2024-01-02 11:00:00" --until "2024-01-02 12:00:00" --no-pager -q 2>/dev/null) || { echo "journalctl failed" >&2; exit 1; }
count=$(printf '%s
' "$raw" | grep -iE '\(CRON\) error|exit status [1-9]|command failed|sendmail.*(error|fail)|MAILTO.*(error|fail)' | wc -l) || true
printf 'failure_count=%s
window_seconds=%s
' "$count" "3600"
